message:
fix: revert everyNthFrame to 1 to fix screencast timeout

everyNthFrame:2 caused screencast frames to not arrive in time,
resulting in ScreencastTimeout errors on complex sites like vscode.dev.

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.8.10",
+  "version": "0.8.11",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
